_meta.description: Mage Knight map site types with enemies, fortification, and interaction rules

interactions.description: Buy 1 Healing for 3 Influence
Recruit village-icon units at unit cost
Draw 2 cards, Reputation -1

sites.name: Monastery
sites.enemyNote: Only if burned; units cannot help in this fight

interactions.description: Buy 1 Healing for 2 Influence
Buy Advanced Action for 6 Influence
Recruit monastery-icon units at unit cost
Burn the Monastery: Reputation -3, fight violet enemy without units, reward is an Artifact
Assault the Keep: Reputation -1, fight fortified grey defenders
Once owned, recruit keep-icon units at unit cost
Once owned, draw an extra card when starting turn adjacent or on the Keep
Assault the Mage Tower: Reputation -1, fight fortified violet defenders
Once conquered, recruit units at the Mage Tower
Once conquered, buy Spells for 7 Influence plus one matching color mana

sites.name: Dungeon
sites.special: Night rules always apply inside the Dungeon. Units cannot participate in combat.

interactions.description: Fight brown enemy under night rules without units
Roll mana die: gold or black = gain a Spell, any other color = gain an Artifact
May be re-fought for Fame only; no additional reward

sites.name: Tomb
sites.special: Night rules always apply inside the Tomb. Units cannot participate in combat.

interactions.description: Fight red/draconum enemy under night rules without units
Gain 1 Spell and 1 Artifact
May be re-fought for Fame only; no additional reward

sites.name: Ancient Ruins
sites.enemyNote: Yellow token determines encounter: altar or enemy tokens

interactions.description: Pay 3 mana of the shown color — no combat required, gain 7 Fame
Fight the enemies shown on the token instead of using the altar
Fight brown enemy
Gain 2 random mana crystals: roll die twice — gold = choose any color, black = gain 1 Fame instead of a crystal

sites.name: Spawning Grounds
sites.special: Partial defeat leaves remaining enemy tokens in place.

interactions.description: Fight 2 brown enemies
Gain 1 Artifact and 3 random mana crystals
End your turn on the mine to gain 1 mana crystal of the mine's color
End your turn here to discard 1 Wound from your hand
Start your turn here during the Day: gain 1 gold mana token
Start your turn here during the Night: gain 1 black mana token

sites.name: City
sites.enemyNote: Defenders determined by city card; city bonuses apply to defense

interactions.description: Assault the City: Reputation -1, fight fortified city defenders with city bonuses
Once conquered, recruit city-icon units at unit cost
Once conquered, buy items available in the city
City leader draws +2 cards when starting a turn adjacent to or on the city
